title: After the 10 day period, can I drive to and from work?
content:
After the 10 day period, can I drive to and from work?

What do I need to do to help my insurance?

Can all my classes be done in Palm Beach?

Will 3,500 be the maximum?

I have a psychiatrist and have recently been prescribed new medications

[REDACTED:PHONE NUMBER]
I need to enroll in the dui level one class
Apply online and then come in person to complete enrollment


Let my attorney know I am in drug counseling with a certified addiction professional and she is willing to provide any documentation that will be helpful for my case.

Medicine prescribed by a psychiatrist which alters my ability to function at times.

I give permission to Kimberlee Trinkofsky, LMHC, PA[REDACTED:PHONE NUMBER]) to speak with Dr. Moskowitz.

Sincerely,
Anthony Padavano
context: From document: After the 10 day period, can I drive to and from work?
